name: Apple Raisin Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 cups hot water or skim milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the bread cubes, raisins, and apples in a large bowl.
2. Add the hot water or milk and brown sugar to the bowl.
3. Mix everything together thoroughly and let it stand for 20 to 30 minutes.
4. Stir in the beaten egg whites until foamy, then add the cinnamon and vanilla extract.
5. Mix all ingredients well.
6. Pour the mixture into a sprayed 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit, uncovered, for 45 to 60 minutes, or until set and lightly browned.
